reviews.title: Great Headset at a Cheap Price
reviews.text:
Excellent hands free headset that work great with the Avaya model 9608G phone.
Based on the cheap price, I was not anticipating something that worked this good.
The overall construction is good and the sound quality at both ends is good as well.
Since purchasing the first set, we have purchased several more sets for others in our office. All of which have worked great. Just plug then into the headset jack on the back of the phone and you are ready to go, nothing more to do.
It would have been nice if they offered a headset dual headphones to block out more background noise. I did inquire, but they don't.
Overall, myself and others using them in our office, are happy with them.

reviews.title: Very well made.
reviews.text: I ordered the Impeto RCA Cable to replace stock cables that were included with my turntable. These are extremely durable and look high quality. The sound seems crisper and they are a nice touch to my audio setup without breaking the bank. I am pleasantly surprised and would highly recommend if you are in the market for some RCA cables. I am definitely going to order more when I add to my stereo.

reviews.title: Over-the-top quality
reviews.text: We are using these to connect a cheap record player to better speakers. To be honest, this cable feels like overkill for what we need. Such a solid premium feel! The braided cable is substantial. The connectors are copper, high quality, and fit snugly. If you don't mind the price, these are very nice cables.

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

reviews.title: Solves AirPod Issue
reviews.text: I have a love/hate relationship with my AirPods and these are making me love them a LOT more. On their own, my AirPods cause my ears to hurt terribly. Not to mention, they fall out at the slightest movement, like smiling or turning my head. Talk about ANNOYING. These tips cure those ailments. Now I can exercise with my AirPods in and never worry about them falling out. I have tiny ears, and the fit is great with no discomfort at all. I love that the little hook sticks up into the cartilage of my ear to make a really secure fit. The silicon keeps the buds from irritating my ears too. I’m so happy I got these. Now I can actually put my AirPods to good use.

reviews.title: Great fun case for Airpods Pro but Amazon shipping cropped the ball again!
reviews.text:
Nice protective case but not sure why they can't make it one piece like the 2nd gen Airpod cases. I've seen lots of reviews for others that says top will not stay on because of two piece design.
Now I purchased two, which I usually do with an item like this. One for backup since these kinds of items tend to wear fast. Both were shipped on different dates and the first one was delivered to wrong address. Amazon shipping has really gone downhills. They need to address this issue...Fast!

reviews.title: Exact type of ear buds I need.
reviews.text: These ear buds are hard to find anymore.  I love the ability to pull one bud out and leave it dangle vs the newer ear buds that you have to pocket if you take out.  I wish they had gel pieces that enter your ears as I have small ears so they get a little sore after several hours of wearing.  But I will take it as I can get the ease of use I want from them.  Volume, sound and use of buttons are all fantastic.

reviews.title: Almost lost my AirPods because of this case.
reviews.text:
Had my AirPods attached to my phone case until it wasn’t.
On the first day I tried this case out on my phone, I almost lost my AirPods. I was Christmas shopping and had my phone in my back pocket the entire time. When I got home I noticed my AirPods wasn’t attached to my phone. So, I hopelessly went back to the first store I was at and there they were, on the parking lot floor! Thankfully no one had seen them! So no thanks to this case I have my AirPods.

reviews.title: Handy
reviews.text: Good for gym or anywhere.

reviews.title: Neckbands are fine, but earhooks are useless for me
reviews.text:
The neckbands worked fine, and all items gripped my gen 2 AirPods okay, but the earhooks were not even a little useful for me.

I’m used to wearing headphones with integral earhooks, and loved the fit of those, but these add-on earhooks for Airpods do not have the right amount of rigidity, nor is it easy enough to rotate and position them appropriately with respect to the AirPod stem so that the combined geometry of the two would ever align to my ear. Because of those two factors, they simultaneously made my AirPods look kind of stupid while at the same time actually making the fit/hold even worse; they seemed almost more likely to fall out with the hooks than without them.

reviews.title: Poor quality silicone that easily tears
reviews.text: I didn't know that silicone could actually tear like this stuff has when I removed them from my AirPods. I'm past the return window and these literally ripped after about a month and a half of use when I was trying to slide them off the AirPods. Look elsewhere!

reviews.title: Air pod holder
reviews.text: Since they are plastic we will see hold long they last. They are a little difficult to get on and off.
